title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ACC Limited are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!
